sources.title: EU herbal monograph on Hedera helix L., folium (EMA)
Hedera helix L. - Plants of the World Online (Kew)

description: Ivy leaf preparations are defined as specific dry or liquid extracts with stated drug-extract ratios and extraction solvents.
dosage: EMA monograph dosing schedules depend on extract type (defined dry/liquid extracts by DER and solvent); preserve product-specific EMA schedule details and age bands when selecting a product label dose.
legalStatus: Legal; used in registered cough preparations
preparation: EMA-defined extract preparations (dry/liquid/soft extracts with specified DER and solvents), administered orally; consult clinician if symptoms persist more than 1 week.
region: Native range Europe/Mediterranean region to Iran.
summary: Hedera helix leaf preparations are used as an expectorant in productive cough, with defined extract preparations and dosing schedules; pregnancy/lactation safety is not established.
